svg.text: ARTIST 1 = THE HAT AND THE HEM = eight species, judged at 18 and 32
Every species owns a unique top edge and a unique bottom edge. Stack: white 40 halo, ink 20 keyline, flat currentColor, one 0.16 under shade, four colors.
SIZE LADDER = 18 / 32 / 44 / 64 px tall. Left block bgPanel, right block terrainPlain. The 64 px pair is frame1 then frame2.
4x INSPECTION = editing only. Nothing here was approved from this row.
4 PLAYER COLORS x 3 BACKGROUNDS, all eight species, every cell 32 px tall (true game size)
rows are player0 coral, player1 cyan, player2 green, player3 orchid. The hard cell is green on terrain: middle block, third row.
18 px DOCK BADGE ROW = the head crop, the only thing the dock draws. The same eight again at 44 px on the right.
ALL EIGHT SILHOUETTES = the collision test, at 32 px and at 18 px.
left = raw geometry masks, frame1 then frame2 per species, then the 18 px row
right = the TRUE rendered silhouette (halo dilated, tinted to ink) at 32 and 18
